title: BlessLiving Black Double Duvet Set: Soft Microfiber Grey Gold Marble Bedding with Zipper Closure, Reversible Lightweight Watercolor Abstract Chic Printed Quilt Cover or Comforter Cover (200x200cm)
features: PREMIUM QUALITY FABRIC - BlessLiving single duvet cover set are crafted with the finest quality microfiber material, ultra softness and comfort. Lightweight, breathable, cool & supple to the touch. BlessLiving makes classy soft bedding for a smooth sleeping experience to make you feel refreshed and rejuvenated after every sleep.
MARBLE PATTERN- This fashion marble stone geometric pattern duvet cover is perfect for the trendy and stylish individual.
PERFECT FIT - This 3 Piece DOUBLE Duvet Cover Set Includes: 1 * Duvet Cover (W:200 x L:200 cm); 2 * Pillowcase (W:50 cm x L:75 cm). NOTE: Set DOES NOT include any INSIDE FILLERS AND ACCESSORIES.
CLEAN DESIGN - Duvet cover has nonslip corner ties and hidden zipper closure; shams are finished neat with envelope closures.
CARE & WASHING - Easy care and machine wash makes this duvet set single long lasting. Machine washable with cold water. Can be tumbled on low heat to dry. Do not bleach & dry clean.
description: Product Description Blessliving is one of the leading exporter of characteristic home textiles. Our main products include duvet cover sets, comforter sets, sheets, blankets, quilts, panels and more. We use high grade fabric and produce spiritual products under the supervision of our well-versed designers who have immense expertise in this particular domain. Whether you’re looking for kids bedding - like boys bedding and girls bedding - or a particular color or patterned bedding and comforter sets for a big look, we’ve got picks for every room in your home. BREATHABLE SOFTNESS Softness and warmth breathable and more durable than cotton, microfibers are processed to protect against any shrinkage after washing. CLEAN DESIGN Duvet cover has nonslip corner ties and hidden zipper closure; shams are finished neat with envelope closures. WASH INSTRUCTIONS Our duvet covers are easy to clean, machine wash in a gentle cycle with cold water, don't use bleach, no shrinkage or fade. BLESSLIVING Stylish Printing Duvet Cover Set 1 Duvet Cover+2 Matching Pillow Shams Package Includes 1x Duvet cover (Without Comforter) 2x Pillow shams Size Information Single 1 x (135x200)cm duvet cover and 1 x(50x75)cm pillowcases Double 1 x (200x200)cm duvet cover and 2 x(50x75)cm pillowcases King 1 x (230x220)cm duvet cover and 2 x(50x75)cm pillowcases Super King-Size 1 x (260x220)cm duvet cover and 2 x (50x75)cm pillowcases Attention All dimensions are measured manually with deviation ranged at 1-1.5inches.
